runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 13 over 520m at this track behind Zipping Kayli beaten 18 lengths (30.41) in a Grade 5. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn checked off the heels, losing momentum.

runners.formComment: At the last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Zipping Aladdin beaten 9 lengths (30.60). Well placed and among the chances here.

runners.formComment: Could manage only seventh last time but turned heads the start prior when she clocked a solid 29.86 over 520m finishing second at Wentworth Park. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn, lost momentum and raced wide.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 4.5 lengths at this track over 365m (21.00) beating Tip Me Frank in Maiden on March 26. Hard to recommend this time.

runners.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (30.02) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 5 for the first time. Others appear better placed.
